creator: 4diman@gmail.com
text:
It show menu, then tying to load kernel, but fails.
ZFS: i/o error - all block copies unavailable

Installed via default installer.
Same setup on hyper-v 2012r2 works fine.
Same setup on FreeBSD 12,11,10 on hyper-v 2012 works fine.
Setup with root on UFS works fine.

A few more info, including one workaround:
https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/freebsd-13-0-with-root-on-zfs-on-hyper-v-2012.81168/
